caption: A computer screen displays a terminal window with a dark background and white and green text, showing a series of command-line operations. The terminal is running a process involving "msgtail" and "kubectl," with long lines of log output featuring timestamps such as "Oct 28 00:21:21" and references to "pathfinder/log.log." In the top-left corner, the terminal tab is labeled "Terminal." As the sequence progresses, the user interacts with the command line. A cursor appears, and the command "kubectl get -o yaml configmap yaml" is typed and executed, causing the screen to scroll. The output of this command fills the terminal window, displaying a structured YAML configuration file. The window's title bar remains consistent, showing "Activities" and "Terminal" at the top, while the background remains a solid black void outside the active terminal application.
